tagline: Databricks One, the simplified Databricks interface, has been renamed to Genie.
what_it_does: Databricks One, the simplified Databricks interface, has been renamed to Genie. The feature and its capabilities are unchanged. Genie enables users to: View and interact with AI/BI dashboards to track key performance indicators (KPIs) and analyze metrics.
why_it_matters: Genie enables users to: View and interact with AI/BI dashboards to track key performance indicators (KPIs) and analyze metrics.
key_takeaway: Databricks One, the simplified Databricks interface, has been renamed to Genie.
